session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report results. The previous run only failed on Prettier formatting which has now been fixed. Confirm all checks pass.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to verify all checks pass

session.assistant:
Excellent! All checks pass. Here's a summary of the results:
## make fast-ci - All Checks Passed
**Linting:** All checks passed
**Format Check:** 1662 files already formatted
**Prettier Check:** All matched files use Prettier code style
**Markdown Check:** OK
**Exec Reference Check:** .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
**Type Checking (ty):** All checks passed
**Unit Tests:** - **erk:** 5883 passed in 11.99s - **erk-dev:** 136 passed in 4.36s - **erk-statusline:** 115 passed in 0.76s - **erk-mcp:** 24 passed
**AGENTS.md Standard:** PASSED - CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 - Violations: 0
The Prettier formatting fix has resolved the previous failure, and the entire test suite and all CI checks are now passing successfully.
